name: Better Than Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the eggs in a large bowl until frothy.
2. Mix in the orange and lemon juices, sugar, cinnamon, ginger, and cloves.
3. Spoon the ice cream into a large punch bowl; stir in the egg mixture until combined.
4. Refrigerate if not serving immediately.
5. Before serving, pour in the ginger ale.
6. Sprinkle the top with nutmeg.
Makes 18 (6 oz) servings.
